prompt: A first-person POV screenshot inside a VRChat lobby featuring a dark checkered floor, a "VR CHAT" welcome sign on the left, a "Mirror" doorway, and an "Avatar Showcase" on the right. The viewer's hands are visible in the foreground, wearing white sleeves with red dashed stitching, reaching forward. A red muted microphone UI icon sits in the bottom left corner. In the center stands Ran Mouri from Detective Conan in her blue school uniform, smiling with closed eyes and patting the heads of the two smaller characters. On her left is Conan Edogawa in his blue suit and red bowtie. On her right is the Ugandan Knuckles meme character. Each character has a floating nameplate above them: the tall girl's reads "Ran Mouri" in yellow over "LetsAskAQuestion" in white, the boy's reads "Conan Edogawa" over "conan.exe", and the red creature's reads "Ugandan Knuckles" over "do u know de way".
